title: Bubblegum SMP
description: This is the official Modpack for Bubblegum SMP
body:
### Bubblegum SMP - yet another voice chat server

This is a simple, lightly modded SMP. There is no need for the mods to join, although they make the game a bit more fun and competitive.

**What the Modpack adds:**

- Voice chat
- Optimization Mods
- Minimap
- Essentials
- and some more mods that add to the feel or come in handy

**What the server offers:**

- Voice chat
- Waystones
- Graves
- MCMMO
- Claims
- PVP toggle


We are just starting out, so it is your time to grab a friend, join, and help us build a world from scratch.

IP: play.bubblegumsmp.com
